items_thickened.detail: No direct or indirect financing offered. No arranged financing. No guarantees of franchisee obligations.

operative_restrictions: Non-exclusive territory — other franchisees can compete in same territory
Cannot operate or solicit outside territory without written consent
Cannot use internet/catalog/telemarketing to solicit outside territory
Existing exclusive-to-NE converts may have protected referral sources in your territory
Territory may be modified at renewal
Minimum revenue $100K-$500K escalating, termination if missed 2 consecutive years
Must book 80% of inspections through EZBook if using it
No right to acquire additional franchises
Cannot relocate territory (can relocate home office within territory)
Franchisor reserves all alternative distribution channel rights

obligations: No part-time employment or other work commitment
Entity franchisees: 50%+ beneficial owner must operate full-time
All shareholders/members/partners must sign personal guarantee (G-1)
No interest in or relationship with competitors
Must offer Plus, Premium, Prestige packages
Home inspection and related services only (mold, radon, septic, sewer, pool/spa, water, well, wind mitigation, virtual open house)
Cannot solicit protected referral sources of existing exclusive-to-NE converts
Franchisor may add required services without limitation

items_thickened.detail: No public figures used to promote franchises.
